title: decussocarpus comptonii
intro: Decussocarpus comptonii, also known as the Compton's tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antispasmodic and expectorant properties.
